name: Volkare
flavor: Magestone (Mage Knight) — a co-op boss reprising the great warlord Volkare, the iconic Mage Knight antagonist. Rival heroes must set aside their feud to break his host. Armor/Life tuned above the player curve for a boss.
target: Volkare himself at the heart of his host; used for line-of-sight and range to him.

attack.name: Wrath of the Warlord
attack.summary: Every Threats' turn: place 1 Wound on all valid targets (his guard strikes), then 1 Wound on all Units in play whether valid targets or not (the host advances). Each Lightning rolled in the collective attack adds 1 more Wound to each valid target.

effects.text: Guard: 1 Wound on all valid targets.
The host advances: 1 Wound on all Units in play.

superSpecialAbility.summary: Volley from the Host: on 3+ Lightning in the collective Threat attack, Volkare's whole army looses at once — place 2 Wounds on every Unit in play.

figureCandidates.name: General Volkare
figureCandidates.roleFit: The Volkare figure itself — the natural centrepiece for this boss.

figureCandidates.name: Za'Rax'As
figureCandidates.roleFit: An alternate imposing Unique if you want a different boss model.

figureCandidates.name: General Marz
figureCandidates.roleFit: Another Unique commander usable as the boss.
